label: AI Insight UI — Schemas
info:
Trino schema browser exposed to the UI:
  GET /api/v1/schemas                          — list catalogs/schemas/tables in INFORMATION_SCHEMA
  GET /api/v1/schemas/:catalog/:schema/:table  — DESCRIBE a single table (column list)
Uses the Trino OIDC token-grant flow with the same env vars the AI Insight backend uses (AI_INSIGHT_TRINO__*).

name: list tables (Trino information_schema)
describe table
fetch Trino token + run query
